module:
Unit tests for vector database contract validation.

These tests ensure that all vector database backends properly 
implement the VectorDatabase interface contract.

test_vector_database_contract.docstring: Test that all backends properly implement the VectorDatabase interface.

test_backend_type_enum_consistency.docstring: Test that all backend types in the enum are properly registered.

test_similarity_metric_enum_consistency.docstring: Test that SimilarityMetric is consistently implemented across backends.

test_method_signature_consistency.docstring: Test that all backends implement the same method signatures.

test_capability_declaration_structure.docstring: Test that capability declarations follow the expected structure.

test_model_result_consistency.docstring: Test that search results use the correct model structure.
